construct.en: Seeing one’s work as a calling
construct.tr: İşini bir meslek aşkı olarak görme

original_citation.en: Dobrow, S. R., & Tosti‐Kharas, J. (2011). Calling: The development of a scale measure. Personnel Psychology, 64(4), 1001-1049. https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1744-6570.2011.01234.x
original_citation.tr: Dobrow, S. R., & Tosti‐Kharas, J. (2011). Calling: The development of a scale measure. Personnel Psychology, 64(4), 1001-1049. https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1744-6570.2011.01234.x

description.en: A scale that assesses the extent to which a person experiences work as a central, meaningful, and identity-defining calling.
description.tr: Bireyin işini merkezi, anlamlı ve kimliğini tanımlayan bir meslek aşkı olarak algılama düzeyini ölçen bir ölçektir.

response_format_tr: 5’li Likert tipi ölçek, 1 = Hiç katılmıyorum ile 5 = Tamamen katılıyorum
response_format_en: 5-point Likert scale, from 1 = strongly disagree to 5 = strongly agree
target_population_tr: Çalışan yetişkinler. Bu makalede 286 Türk öğretmen örnekleminde test edilmiştir.
target_population_en: Working adults. In this article, it was tested in a sample of 286 Turkish teachers.

reliability.en: Cronbach’s alpha was .90 in this study.

validity_notes.en: CFA results indicated acceptable fit. Composite reliability was .93, AVE was .55, and factor loadings ranged from .63 to .84.
validity_notes.tr: CFA sonuçları kabul edilebilir uyuma işaret etmiştir. Bileşik güvenirlik .93, AVE .55, faktör yükleri ise .63 ile .84 arasında değişmiştir.

citation.en: Cem Ersoy, N., Peker, M., & Giray, M. D. (2023). Exploring the association between calling and work engagement: Needs satisfaction and meaningful work as mediators. Studies in Psychology, 43(2), 345-366. https://doi.org/10.26650/SP2022-1152304
citation.tr: Cem Ersoy, N., Peker, M., & Giray, M. D. (2023). Exploring the association between calling and work engagement: Needs satisfaction and meaningful work as mediators. Studies in Psychology, 43(2), 345-366. https://doi.org/10.26650/SP2022-1152304

notes.en: In the original scale, items are occupation-specific and refer directly to the respondent’s own field (e.g., “I am passionate about playing my instrument / singing / engaging in my artistic specialty / business / being a manager”). In this Turkish version, the item wording was translated in a more generic form, while still using contextually appropriate work-related expressions.
notes.tr: Özgün ölçekte maddeler mesleğe/iş alanına özgü biçimde formüle edilmiştir ve katılımcının kendi alanına doğrudan gönderme yapmaktadır (ör., “I am passionate about playing my instrument / singing / engaging in my artistic specialty / business / being a manager”). Bu Türkçe formda ise maddeler, bağlama uygun iş/meslek ifadeleri korunarak daha genel bir dille çevrilmiştir.
